response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, long-tenured generalist with genuine strengths — 20+ years across web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, including low-latency work at Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second, plus recent AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators) that matches the AI-first framing. However, this is a Principal/IC6 role centered on experimentation systems, and the resume shows no experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature-flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis experience. There is also little evidence of Principal-scope leadership: architecting systems used by multiple teams at enterprise scale, leading multi-workstream initiatives, or cross-org stakeholder alignment. The core domain gap at this seniority level outweighs the strong general engineering fundamentals.
strengths: 20+ years of broad engineering experience, including high-scale, low-latency distributed systems (millions of HTTP requests/second at Sociomantic)
Hands-on AI tooling experience (MCP code generators, agentic-workflow frameworks) aligning with the AI-first mandate
Strong craftsmanship culture — TDD, CI/CD, open-source authorship, and a track record of teaching and mentoring
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core of the role
No demonstrated telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis background despite the JD's high data-aptitude bar
Career trajectory shows senior/staff IC work at small companies, without evidence of Principal-level, multi-team enterprise platform ownership

key_factors.factor: Gap to Principal/IC6 scope and cross-org leadership
Strong general engineering fundamentals at scale plus AI tooling
